subcodes.first_line: O my God, O my God! The bird of devotion hath soared with the wings of fidelity from the nests of mortality unto Thy sanctified gardens [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الهی الهی قد طار طیر الولاء باجنحه الوفاء من اوکار الفناء الی حدائق قدسک و
subcodes.subjects: @soul; spirit after death, @consolation and comfort, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
